docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY COLEMAN, PERCY AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-1996 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT C
